mutation_boundary: DEV_CONFIG_DIR, STUDIO_PROCESS_MANAGER_HOME, STUDIO_HOME, TMPDIR, and per-run site directories under STUDIO_FUZZ_RUNTIME_ROOT

proof_artifacts.description: Declarative isolation boundary for destructive Studio MySQL fuzzing

required_runner_behavior: create a fresh temp config dir per run
set DEV_CONFIG_DIR, STUDIO_PROCESS_MANAGER_HOME, and STUDIO_HOME to that temp dir
create all mutable site/runtime directories under STUDIO_FUZZ_RUNTIME_ROOT
never delete paths outside the per-run runtime root
